settings.title: RECYCLED with care
settings.text:
Italian craftsmanship, daring creativity and sustainability are at the heart of what we do. That is why we are proud to have made the transition to manufacturing all of our jewellery with recycled Silver and 18kt Gold.

We're proud to offer a Recycling Programme that transforms your old jewelry into new creations. Join us in reducing waste and giving your pieces a second life

settings.title: Our Concept
settings.text:
At MARCO DAL MASO, sustainability isn't just a concept; it's a way of life. We're dedicated to making a difference, one stunning piece of jewelry at a time.

We proudly use 100% recycled gold and sterling silver, knowing that recycling these materials cuts down CO₂ emissions by 2/3 compared to mining raw materials. And here's the best part, the finished look and quality of our items are identical to traditionally mined materials.

settings.title: Our Dedication
settings.text:
Our dedication to sustainability extends to the heart of our production process. We have implemented energy-efficient practices in jewelry-making, utilizing state-of-the-art, eco-friendly equipment and processes to optimize production and minimize waste.

We're not just crafting jewelry; we're crafting a better future. Join us in our journey toward more sustainable, beautiful, and ethical jewelry.

Our Products

Our products are meticulously handcrafted in Italy, working with local craftsmen and women who infuse each piece with their skill and passion. By keeping our production local, not only do we maintain the highest of quality, we significantly reduce the carbon emissions associated with long-distance transportation.

Though not all materials and production can be down locally, we are proud of the relationships we have created with our trusted partners around the world. We source our gemstones directly and only work with global partners who can assure conflict-free materials and who do not contribute to ecological damage.

settings.title: Recycling Materials
settings.text: Recycling materials such as silver and gold cuts down CO₂ emissions by 2/3 compared to mining these raw materials. MARCO DAL MASO uses 100% recycled silver and 18k gold and the finished look and quality of our items are identical to the materials that have been mined.

settings.title: Fair Partnerships
settings.text: We are proud of the relationships we have created with our trusted partners around the world. We source our gemstones directly and only work with partners who can assure conflict-free materials and who do not contribute to ecological damage.

custom_css: @media screen and (max-width: 768px) {.custom-rich-text p {font-size: calc(var(--typeBaseSize) * 0.92); } .custom-collection-list div > div .grid__item {width: 100%; } .custom-collection-list:nth-child(2n) > div .grid__item .rte-setting.text-spacing {padding: 0 22px; margin-bottom: 50px !important; display: inline-block; } .custom-collection-list h3 {background: transparent; color: #000; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 15px; }}
